description: Get flexible SME loans with low interest rates tailored for Batswana entrepreneurs. Apply at any branch today.

news.title: New SME Loan Package Launched
news.author: Mosienyane & Partners
news.preview: We have launched a new package tailored for small businesses under P50,000 turnover...
news.body: We are thrilled to announce the launch of our newest financial product — the TapFo SME Fast Loan. Designed specifically for small businesses operating under P50,000 monthly turnover, this package offers same-day approval for amounts up to P25,000 with repayment terms flexible from 6 to 36 months. Speak to any of our consultants at the Main Mall branch to learn more.

news.title: Botswana Finance Expo 2026 — We'll Be There
news.author: Mosienyane & Partners
news.preview: Join us at the Botswana Finance Expo happening March 14-16 at BICC...
news.body: The annual Botswana Finance Expo is happening at the Botswana International Convention Centre from March 14 to 16. Mosienyane & Partners will be exhibiting at Stand B-14. Come meet our team, learn about our products, and enter our P10,000 savings prize draw. Entry is free for all TapFo users.

description: Your neighbourhood grocery store and butchery. Fresh meat, produce and household goods daily. Serving Gaborone West since 2019.
tagline: Fresh every day. Right in your neighbourhood.

news.title: Weekend Braai Special — Lamb Chops P45/kg
news.author: Tshwaragano Grocery
news.preview: This weekend — bulk lamb chops at P45/kg and free coleslaw with every 2kg purchase...
news.body: This weekend only, we're running our biggest braai special of the year. Bulk lamb chops at P45/kg (normal P62/kg), wors at P38/kg, and free coleslaw tub with every purchase of 2kg or more. While stocks last. Come in Friday-Sunday, 7am-7pm.

name: Dr. Boipelo Tlhowe — Physiotherapy

phone_numbers.label: Appointment Line

description: Certified physiotherapist with 9 years experience. Sports injury rehabilitation, post-operative care, and pain management. Home visits available in Gaborone.
tagline: Moving you back to your best.

news.title: New Paediatric Physiotherapy Service
news.author: Dr. Boipelo Tlhowe
news.preview: Dr. Tlhowe now offers specialist paediatric physiotherapy for children from age 2...
news.body: We are pleased to announce that Dr. Boipelo Tlhowe has completed advanced training in paediatric physiotherapy and now offers specialist services for children from age 2 through to teenagers. This includes developmental delay assessments, post-surgery rehabilitation, and sports injury management for young athletes. Appointments available every Saturday.

media_notes.title: Consultation Room
media_notes.desc: A calm, professional environment designed to make patients comfortable.

name: Rapid Transfers Botswana
description: Same-day courier and logistics solutions across Gaborone and Greater Gaborone. Motorbike, sedan and van options available. Parcel tracking on request.

name: Khumo Properties & Developments
description: Property sales, rentals and development across Gaborone, Francistown and Maun. Residential and commercial listings updated weekly.

name: Naledi Digital Solutions
description: Website development, app builds, graphic design and social media management. Proudly serving businesses across Botswana since 2021.

news.title: We Built TapFo's Brand Identity
news.author: Naledi Digital Solutions
news.preview: Proud to have partnered with TapFo.bw on their visual identity...
news.body: Naledi Digital Solutions is proud to announce our partnership with TapFo.bw, Botswana's newest business directory platform. We worked closely with the TapFo team on their complete brand identity — from logo design to app UI guidelines. If you're a business looking for branding, digital or web services, reach out to our team today.

name: Botswana Bake Studio
description: Custom cakes, pastries and bread baked fresh daily. Wedding cakes, birthday cakes and corporate orders. Order 48 hours in advance.
tagline: Baked with love. Every single day.

name: Gaborone Driving Academy
description: Professional driving lessons for code 8, code 10 and motorcycle licences. Flexible scheduling including weekend lessons. Vehicles provided.
tagline: Drive with confidence. Licence with ease.

name: Setshaba Solar & Electrical

tagline: Power your home. Save the planet. Save money.

name: Precious Mama's Kitchen
description: Traditional Setswana catering for weddings, funerals, graduations and corporate events. Seswaa, bogobe, morogo and more. Feeding 50 to 500 guests.
tagline: Motho o ja ka seatla — food from the heart.

name: BW Health Pharmacy
description: Full-service pharmacy offering prescription medications, OTC products, baby care, vitamins and supplements. Pharmacist on duty daily.
